creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 202920
Add wlock for priv modification to ng_iface_shutdown()

The problem seems to be in ng_iface_shutdown() that passes zero ifp to if_detach().

Leaving aside bad memory, the only case in which that can be possible is second call to ng_iface_shutdown() after it nullified priv->ifp and before it destoyed the rest.

Sergey, please apply attached patch and add options INVARIANTS to your kernel, too.

If it does not fix your problem, please post your kernel config file and mpd.conf.
